title: Wire LICHEN inbound events into Meshtastic adapter
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.8 now has an adapter text-emission primitive, but the gateway does not yet consume real LICHEN-native/L2 message or status events and pass them to the Meshtastic BLE adapter. What needs to be done: define the no-hardware event source seam, connect incoming LICHEN message/status events to lichen_meshtastic_adapter_emit_* APIs, preserve BLE session/queue behavior, and add qemu/native_sim tests or a simulator harness proving the gateway path.
